title: Weather Extreme
description: Survive extreme weathers featuring ProtoManly's Weather Mod!
body:
![Weather Extreme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e20d08b25f0a072f03a75c218a1ee933085fc6bd_0.webp)
### Simple and optimized modpack focused on ProtoManly's Weather Mod.
A modpack that I created just to play PM Weather. Nothing special about it.



## Weather ☁️
This modpack features ProtoManly's Weather Mod. It is the most realistic and powerful weather mod of Minecraft. It adds:
1. **Realistic Cloud**
2. **Tornadoes**
3. **Supercells**
4. **Squall Line**
5. **Cyclones**

Images on the gallery.

(WARNING: If you have a slow/old/weak PC, please, do not play this modpack. It may fry your PC.)

## Optimization ⚡
PM Weather Mod is **heavy**, so I added performance mods to change your gameplay from potato to playable. 
Featuring: **Sodium, Lithium, Indium, ModernFix, C2ME, Noisium, Entity Culling** and more.

## Cool Mods
I added Immersive Aircrafts, Framed Blocks, Rechiseled, decoration mods and more. Just to make the gameplay cooler.

Multiplayer: I added E4MC to be easier for you and your friends to play together.
## Warnings ⚠️
**The first thing you gonna do when you download this modpack is to CHANGE the RAM allocation to 8GB (8000MB)!**
**PM Weather does NOT works with Shaders and Distant Horizons. 
(Textures that changes the skybox and clouds too)**

**You computer NEEDS to have at least 12-16GB of RAM! If you have less than this, DO NOT PLAY.
This modpack will use 8GB of RAM. You can lower it to 6GB (6000MB) but do not lower further than this (6GB can be laggy if you are close or inside a tornado, clouds and etc.).**

## Updates ⬆️
Yeah I'm too lazy to write a lot of things. I'm updating when I can.

Good morning, good evening and good night.
